result.result:
## Shipped this week on agent-office (Apr 13–18)

**Phase 1–3 foundation (Apr 13)** — `bd59458` foundation, `6a1ede2` agent core (personas/skills/launcher), `ca066d7` memory engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer).

**Phase 4 — pixel-art office UI (Apr 13–14)** — `eaebe7c` React frontend with animated office, then an engine extraction series (`a88a3c6`, `54fcd13`, `00cdc7b`, `9df83eb`, `769983d`, `fd62f21`) splitting pixel-agents into constants/sprites/floor/walls/layout/core engine modules. `c8c8f57` `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper, `a4ef81e` default 25×20 layout with 7 themed zones, `68467b0` 3-column dashboard layout, `6ac04c0` wired canvas in and removed old CSS scene, plus coordinate/zone fixes (`b1ca00b`, `48daeac`, `85bff97`).

**Phase 4.5/4.6 — launcher + claude-mem integration (Apr 14)** — `d109f26` read-only claude-mem SQLite adapter, `e079b4f` persona→observation filter, `1c875a4` launcher claude-mem context + `preview()`, `acdddfa` `GET /api/office/preview`, `27cb1d3` `LaunchPreview`, `c0f0d86` picker opens preview instead of launching, `64ed75e` spawns Claude Code in iTerm2. Merged in `6b61356`.

**Phase 5 — telemetry (Apr 15)** — `2534692`/`3199451` telemetry dashboard, `4d9806d` provider adapters + office state + portfolio stats, `42aab52` provider-aware launch preview, `a4cb528` local skill roots + launch inventory.

**Provider-neutral history + doctor (Apr 16)** — `9c4afb4` provider-neutral project history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` `doctor` command, plus stability fixes (`aaa47ed`, `a8f6bd4`, `fc03de3`, `ef1cec2`).

**Apr 18 — unified memory brief + UI rework**
- `4d9a58a` persona-scoped memory brief generator
- `17bf243` wires brief into live session launch, `ec56fb9` renders it in `LaunchPreview`
- `2dbef00` unified memory stats + semantic search, **drops the claude-mem fallback**
- `3c1cf94` persona memory stats + semantic search in project picker
- `3b6c0b4` refactor to single `LaunchWizard` modal, 4 next-next steps
- `d5da889` office floor simplified to Boss / Workspace / Dungeon + Fixer zone
- `01f2a70` Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (marketing)
- `40c5014` bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings
- `18e1cbb` README rewritten around the unified-memory USP
- `0c3dfbd` added sqlite-vec, @huggingface/transformers, playwright

**Uncommitted / not yet shipped:** `bench/`, `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs`, `scripts/bench-judge.mjs`, `scripts/bench-aggregate.mjs` — whitepaper benchmark suite is local-only on `main`. Per memory 3762, runs are still incomplete (missing conditions/repeats), so I won't claim results.

**Key decision:** dropped the claude-mem fallback in favour of the unified memory + vector path (`2dbef00`). I haven't independently verified the fallback is fully gone from every call site — worth a grep before claiming it externally.
